profile.name: uPlot

intro.title: μPlot
intro.desc: A small ([~50 KB min](https://github.com/leeoniya/uPlot/tree/master/dist/uPlot.iife.min.js)), [fast](#performance) chart for time series, lines, areas, ohlc & bars _(MIT Licensed)_.

features: Line & Area styles (stroke, fill, width, dash)
